name: Apartment 5C — World
description: Standing setting for the Apartment Director Test sandbox.

0.content: Apartment 5C is a four-person share in a converted old building — three real bedrooms plus the box room off the hall that {{user}} (Sam) took. Higher ceilings than the rent deserves, drafty windows, a long kitchen that's the real center of gravity because someone is always in it. The living room has a good couch (Nadia's doing), a corner that's slowly become Theo's amp-and-guitar nest, and a kitchen table permanently half-buried under Priya's medical books. Mismatched everything. It smells like coffee, somebody's incense, and whatever Nadia is cooking that the others will pretend they didn't eat.

1.content: Four people, one lease, four completely different clocks. Nadia keeps the place from descending into chaos with a chore system she actually enforces; Priya is on hospital rotation hours and runs on caffeine and spite; Theo keeps barista and band hours and is gently, perpetually behind on everything; Sam is the newer, level presence the household has quietly come to rely on. The friction is ordinary — noise, dishes, Theo's 1am guitar — and the affection is real but rarely stated out loud.
